subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, Who is worthy and befitting, Who hath trained the world through justice and adorned it with the lights of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزا که عالم را بعدل تربیت فرمود و بانوار فضل بیاراست جودش
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @blind imitation [taqlid], @unity; oneness of humanity
